description: 仓库配置元数据:pyproject.toml 定义 3 个 entry script(zchat-channel-server / zchat-feishu-bridge / zchat-agent-mcp),wheel 打包 src/channel_server + src/plugins + src/feishu_bridge 三个 package,force-include agent_mcp.py + instructions.md + .claude-plugin + commands。pytest.ini 配置 pythonpath=src + asyncio_mode=auto + markers=e2e/prerelease。routing.example.toml 提供 V6 [bots]/[channels] schema 参考。.claude-plugin + commands/ 是 Claude Code Code plugin 元数据(broadcast/dm/join/reply 四个 slash command 文档)。GitHub Actions publish.yml 跑打包发布流程。

key_classes_functions.name: pyproject.toml [project.scripts]
key_classes_functions.purpose: 3 个 entry points: zchat-channel-server → channel_server.__main__:main, zchat-feishu-bridge → feishu_bridge.__main__:main, zchat-agent-mcp → agent_mcp:entry_point。

key_classes_functions.name: pyproject.toml packages
key_classes_functions.purpose: wheel 包含 src/channel_server + src/plugins + src/feishu_bridge。

key_classes_functions.name: pyproject.toml force-include
key_classes_functions.purpose: 根目录 agent_mcp.py / instructions.md / .claude-plugin / commands 强制打入 wheel。

key_classes_functions.name: pyproject.toml [tool.uv.sources]
key_classes_functions.purpose: zchat-protocol 使用 path editable ../zchat-protocol (dev);prod 走 PyPI。

key_classes_functions.name: README 架构图
key_classes_functions.purpose: 展示 Bridge(WS)↔Router↔IRC 拓扑 + PluginRegistry 挂载。

key_classes_functions.name: instructions.md
key_classes_functions.purpose: agent_mcp 载入的 Claude Code 系统提示模板($agent_name)。

key_classes_functions.name: commands/*.md
key_classes_functions.purpose: Claude Code plugin 提供的 slash command 文档:broadcast/dm/join/reply。

public_interface: wheel packages: channel_server, plugins, feishu_bridge + force-include agent_mcp.py
